ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tornado_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tornado event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the tornado event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the tornado event */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the tornado event */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the tornado event occurred */,
  "scale" INTEGER /* Scale of the tornado event (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries caused by the tornado event */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities caused by the tornado event */,
  "start_lat" REAL /* Starting latitude of the tornado event */,
  "start_lon" REAL /* Starting longitude of the tornado event */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the tornado event path */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the tornado event path */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of tornado event (e.g., landspout, waterspout, multiple-vortex tornado) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tornado event */,
  "event_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the tornado event */,
  "event_speed" REAL /* Speed of the tornado event */,
  "event_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the tornado event */,
  "tornado_class" TEXT /* Class of the tornado (e.g., weak, moderate, strong) */,
  "peak_wind_speed" REAL /* Peak wind speed of the tornado event */,
  "path_length" REAL /* Length of the tornado event path */,
  "max_width" REAL /* Maximum width of the tornado event path */,
  "start_time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the starting location of the tornado event */,
  "end_time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the ending location of the tornado event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tornado_events_scale FOREIGN KEY ("scale") REFERENCES scales ("scale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tornado_events_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation code for the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scales" (
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tornado scale */,
  "scale_name" TEXT /* Name of the tornado scale */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tornado scale */,
  "min_wind_speed" REAL /* Minimum wind speed for the scale */,
  "max_wind_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed for the scale */,
  "damage_description" TEXT /* Description of the damage caused by the scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event location */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the location */,
  "start_lat" REAL /* Starting latitude of the event location */,
  "start_lon" REAL /* Starting longitude of the event location */,
  "end_lat" REAL /* Ending latitude of the event location */,
  "end_lon" REAL /* Ending longitude of the event location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_locations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES tornado_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, emergency responder, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
